description: Composition Grey shorts made of 100% polyester engineered with ClimaLite technology, has two insert pockets with white tipping, elasticated waist with a drawcord, and mesh lining on the inside with brand name on the left hemFitting Regular  Wash care Wash dark colours separately at less than 30 degrees Do not soak, bleach, tumble dry or dry clean Cool iron; do not iron on print,trims,logoSweat it out in comfort on the tracks or at the gym in this ClimaLite engineered pair of shorts from adidas. The ClimaLite technology keeps you fresh and comfortable, while the polyester fabric offers exemplary comfort. Pair it with an adidas T-shirt and running shoes for the best results.Model statistics  The model wears shorts of length 45 cmHeight: 6', Shoulders: 18"
